notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 (Wikipedia, royalheritage.jo, Al Jazeera encyclopedia, Jordan Armed Forces): Battle of Karameh occurred March 21, 1968, ~15-hour engagement in the town of Karameh near Jordan's western border, Jordanian Armed Forces + PLO factions vs. Israeli occupation forces.

No official confirmation found that March 21 is a paid public holiday under Jordanian law, despite being a prominent annual national commemoration — content states this honestly rather than assuming, per the site's established 'commemoration != confirmed paid holiday' pattern (victory-day-algeria, mujahid-day-algeria).
Sensitive Arab-Israeli conflict topic — content stuck to objective historical facts (date, location, participants, significance) without contemporary political commentary.
nakba-day not yet built — used national-aid-jordan instead in relatedSlugs to avoid related_slug_not_found.
